headline: 🏭 Stabilize Utility Costs: Reliable Rice Husk Pellets for Multi-Fuel Industrial Boilers
🌍 Fueling the Net-Zero Transition: High-Calorific Rice Husk Pellets for Industrial Co-Firing
🌾 Optimize Your Feed Formulations: High-Volume Rice Husk Powder from India's Trusted Supplier
caption:
🌾 Optimizing Cattle Feed Formulations: Premium Feed-Grade Rice Husk Powder from India

For animal feed manufacturers and agricultural mills across South Korea, Vietnam, the UAE, and Germany, securing a reliable, consistent, and cost-effective organic carrier is critical for high-yield nutrition delivery. Ambika Rice Mill & Ambika Biotech delivers high-quality, ground Rice Husk Powder—a cellulose- and lignin-rich organic raw material engineered specifically for bulk agricultural and industrial applications.

Produced at our state-of-the-art facility in Sambalpur, Odisha, our rice husk powder serves as an exceptional fiber-rich roughage carrier and filler for livestock, poultry, and cattle feed formulations. As a trusted industrial raw material exporter India, we maintain strict quality control to ensure a clean, consistent grind that seamlessly integrates into commercial feed mixers.

Why leading global feed mills and industrial manufacturers partner with RHA India:
✔ 100% Organic & Biodegradable: Pure ground rice husk rich in natural cellulose, completely free from chemical contaminants or synthetic additives.
✔ Superior Nutrient Carrier: Excellent physical absorbency and stability, making it the perfect vehicle for carrying liquid micro-ingredients, vitamins, and premixes.
✔ Tailored Granulometry: Controlled grinding processes ensure uniform mesh sizes, preventing clumping and dust-control issues during bulk handling.
✔ Multi-Industry Utility: Beyond animal nutrition, it acts as a sustainable organic filler for wood-plastic composites (WPC), particle boards, and oil absorbents.
✔ Seamless Export Logistics: From our strategically located plant in Odisha, we provide reliable bulk container shipping to major ports worldwide.

As a dedicated bulk rice husk supplier, we guarantee consistent pricing, verified quality parameters, and high-volume production capacity to keep your manufacturing lines running without interruption. Partner with us to elevate your product quality while optimizing raw material costs.

headline: 🔄 Eliminate Boiler Feed Clogs: Anti-Clogging Rice Husk Pellets for Automated Combustion Systems
caption:
🔄 Eliminate Boiler Feed Clogs: Anti-Clogging Rice Husk Pellets for Automated Combustion Systems

For industrial manufacturing plants operating automated stoker or grate boilers, fuel consistency is critical. Uneven fuel sizing, excessive moisture, and loose biomass dust lead to feed-hopper bridging, fuel-line blockages, and irregular thermal output.

At Ambika Rice Mill & Ambika Biotech (RHA India), we address these operational pain points with our high-density, precisely sized Rice Husk Pellets. Engineered from raw, organic agricultural waste in Sambalpur, Odisha, these pellets offer a highly structured, renewable alternative to raw biomass, preventing mechanical downtime while lowering your carbon footprint.

Why global boiler operators and energy plants in Germany, Poland, South Korea, and Japan trust our raw biomass pellets:

✔ Predictable Thermal Output: Delivers a consistent calorific value of 3,200–3,800 kcal/kg, ensuring stable combustion temperatures without sudden drops.

✔ Seamless Automated Feeding: Uniform cylindrical pellet sizing eliminates bridging and clogging in automatic screw feeders and gravity-fed stoker systems.

✔ Low Moisture & High Density: Our mechanical compaction process drives out excess moisture, increasing combustion efficiency and reducing flue gas volume.

✔ Sustainable Coal Substitution: Ideal for co-firing applications, allowing heavy industries to meet strict emission reduction targets without costly boiler retrofits.

✔ Low Residue Profile: Unlike low-grade biomass fuels, our raw husk pellets produce a predictable, manageable ash volume, simplifying grate cleaning.

As a premier industrial raw material exporter India, we manage the entire supply chain from raw material sourcing to containerized bulk shipping. Whether you are seeking a reliable biomass co-firing feedstock or looking to optimize your plant’s heating economics, our Sambalpur facility delivers consistent tonnage year-round.

Partner with RHA India to secure your bulk winter energy supply and stabilize your utility overheads with clean-burning, high-density biomass fuel.
